prompt: A dreamy vintage-style photograph of the Bosphorus in Istanbul at dusk, shot from water level in a vertical composition. The enormous suspension bridge spans the frame from upper left to upper right, with a tall bridge tower on the far left and delicate strings of warm lights hanging down from the cables, plus a line of tiny orange lights tracing the roadway. Below the bridge, calm dark water fills the foreground. Place 3 visible boats total: 1 medium white passenger ferry centered in the middle distance facing the viewer, 1 long low white ferry farther back near the right side under the bridge, and 1 small boat at the far right edge. On the left shoreline, show an illuminated waterfront with warm yellow lights, a few palm trees, and part of an old building at the extreme left edge. Near the center-left background beneath the bridge, include a pale waterside mosque with 1 dome and 2 slender minarets. Behind everything, add a hazy hillside dense with buildings fading into the distance. Use a nostalgic viral Instagram-filter look: heavy warm sepia and muted olive tones, faded contrast, soft focus, visible film grain, subtle vignette, slight light leaks, low clarity, and an aged analog print texture. The atmosphere should feel moody, romantic, cinematic, and softly blurred, like an old travel memory.
